title.zh_CN: AI 助手功能配置 (Assistant Features)

description.zh_CN: 此文件定义了 AI 助手支持的功能列表。它同时用于：(1) 在 AI 大模型的 system prompt 中描述可用功能及其用法；(2) 在游戏内聊天界面的功能菜单中展示可选功能；(3) 玩家选择功能后，AI 会根据功能描述精准调用对应操作。
description.en_US: This file defines the list of features supported by the AI assistant. It is used to: (1) describe available features and their usage in the AI model's system prompt; (2) display selectable features in the in-game chat feature menu; (3) when a player selects a feature, the AI will precisely call the corresponding operation based on the feature description.

howToUse.zh_CN:
修改指南：features 数组中的每个对象代表一个功能。你可以添加新功能或修改现有功能的以下字段：
- key: 功能标识符，对应代码中的意图类型（如 QUERY_RECIPE、ORDER_ITEM 等）
- displayName: 在功能菜单中显示的名称，需提供 zh_CN 和 en_US 两种语言
- description: 功能的详细描述，需提供两种语言
- keywords: 触发该功能的关键词列表，中英文均可
- aiInstruction: 发送给 AI 大模型的指令说明，告诉 AI 如何识别和返回该意图

修改说明：添加新功能时请确保 key 值与代码中的 AssistantIntentType 枚举值一致。删除功能会使其从菜单和 AI prompt 中移除。修改后重启游戏即可生效。
howToUse.en_US:
Usage: Each object in the features array represents a feature. You can add new features or modify existing ones with the following fields:
- key: Feature identifier, corresponds to the intent type in code (e.g. QUERY_RECIPE, ORDER_ITEM, etc.)
- displayName: Name displayed in the feature menu, provide both zh_CN and en_US languages
- description: Detailed description of the feature, provide both languages
- keywords: List of keywords that trigger this feature, supports both Chinese and English
- aiInstruction: Instruction sent to the AI model, telling it how to recognize and return this intent

Notes: When adding a new feature, ensure the key value matches the AssistantIntentType enum in code. Removing a feature will remove it from the menu and AI prompt. A game restart is required for changes to take effect.

key.zh_CN: 功能键名 — 必须与代码中的意图类型一致
key.en_US: Feature key — must match the intent type in code

displayName.zh_CN: 显示名称 — zh_CN 和 en_US 两个语言版本
displayName.en_US: Display name — zh_CN and en_US language versions

description.zh_CN: 功能描述 — 在菜单中显示的解释文字
description.en_US: Feature description — explanatory text shown in the menu

keywords.zh_CN: 触发关键词 — 用户说出这些词时会匹配到此功能
keywords.en_US: Trigger keywords — matching these words triggers this feature

aiInstruction.zh_CN: AI 指令 — 发给大模型的功能说明，指导 AI 如何返回该意图
aiInstruction.en_US: AI instruction — feature explanation sent to the model, guiding AI on how to return this intent

description.zh_CN: 查询AE2网络中的可合成配方/样板，可按名称筛选或浏览全部
description.en_US: Query craftable patterns/recipes in AE2 network, filter by name or browse all

aiInstruction.zh_CN: QUERY_RECIPE: 查询AE2可合成配方/样板，可按名称筛选或留空浏览全部候选
aiInstruction.en_US: QUERY_RECIPE: query AE2 craftable patterns/recipes, filter by name or browse all candidates with empty target

description.zh_CN: 查询AE2网络中的存储概览，返回带缩略图的物品/流体列表（含大数K/M/T格式），可按名称筛选，也可从列表中选中取出到背包
description.en_US: Query AE2 storage overview, returns items/fluids list with thumbnails (K/M/T format), filter by name, select to withdraw

aiInstruction.zh_CN: QUERY_STORAGE: 查询AE2存储，设storageScope为all/items/fluids
aiInstruction.en_US: QUERY_STORAGE: query AE2 storage, set storageScope to all/items/fluids

description.zh_CN: 查询当前世界的天气状况
description.en_US: Query current world weather conditions

aiInstruction.zh_CN: QUERY_WEATHER: 查询当前世界天气
aiInstruction.en_US: QUERY_WEATHER: query current world weather

description.en_US: Query player position, coordinates, facing, chunk

aiInstruction.en_US: QUERY_POSITION: query player position information

description.zh_CN: 查询当前位置的生态群系信息
description.en_US: Query current biome information

aiInstruction.zh_CN: QUERY_BIOME: 查询当前群系信息
aiInstruction.en_US: QUERY_BIOME: query current biome information

description.en_US: Query player inventory space

aiInstruction.zh_CN: QUERY_INVENTORY: 查询玩家背包空间
aiInstruction.en_US: QUERY_INVENTORY: query player inventory space

description.en_US: Query ADM network connector status and binding info

aiInstruction.zh_CN: QUERY_NETWORK: 查询ADM网络/连接器状态
aiInstruction.en_US: QUERY_NETWORK: query ADM network/connector status

description.zh_CN: 查询AE2网络中挂起的合成任务

aiInstruction.zh_CN: QUERY_JOBS: 查询挂起的AE2合成计算任务
aiInstruction.en_US: QUERY_JOBS: query pending AE2 crafting calculation jobs

description.zh_CN: 查询AE2存储网络中物品和流体的实际库存数量，可按名称模糊筛选，支持大数K/M/T显示
description.en_US: Query actual item/fluid quantities in AE2 storage network, filter by name, display with K/M/T format

aiInstruction.zh_CN: QUERY_ITEM_COUNT: 查询AE2存储中物品/流体实际数量，target可选填名称过滤留空列出所有
aiInstruction.en_US: QUERY_ITEM_COUNT: query AE2 storage actual item/fluid quantities, target is optional name filter, leave empty to list all

description.zh_CN: 查询AE2存储网络的字节占用详情、百分比及是否含有无限存储元件

aiInstruction.en_US: QUERY_BYTES: query AE2 storage network byte usage details, percentages and infinite cell detection, leave target empty

description.zh_CN: 使用背包中的高级错位宝石传送到已保存的传送点

aiInstruction.en_US: TELEPORT: teleport to a saved destination using Advanced Dislocator in inventory, target is destination name or number

description.zh_CN: 取消当前等待确认的操作
